calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-22-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Dept. 501 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Waived by plaintiff

Daniel Piccinini, Esq. for the Plaintiff: Paul Gogna as Special Trustee of the Joseph Gogna and Lorraine Gogna Trust.
Plaintiff's Witness Paul Gogna was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Karl Baum.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for Judgment as follows:
The rental agreement is canceled.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 838 Sansome St., #68, San Francisco, CA. 94111.
Back-due rent and damages $2,973.20
Costs $773.20 for a Total of $3,303.20
Judgment was submitted and signed.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-22-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-17-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Paul Gogna is present. Represented by
Attorney Daniel Piccinini appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Karl Baum is not present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of Oct-22-2012 remains on calendar. (D501)
